generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force logistics officer, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign suppliers puts our national security at risk. Remember the semiconductor shortages during the pandemic? That wasn't just about cars - our F-35s were grounded too. We need to bring critical supply chains home. It's not just about being self-sufficient; it's about being prepared. My neighbor, a small business owner who switched to domestic suppliers, told me: 'It was tough at first, but now I sleep better at night.' We owe it to our communities to make these tough but necessary choices. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
